day_trace.speech: Hello! Did someone do some mischief somewhere else last night? I, Blaze, have checked out a SafetySam weed werewolf today! I stole his card late at night, and it turned out that he was not a villager at all, but a werewolf who was causing chaos and wanted to be everyone's scapegoat! The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! The goal today is the same, to vote directly for SafetySam. If anyone else dares to help him lead the way, I will vote for him too! Don't make me angry again!

The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! The goal today is the same, to vote directly for SafetySam. If anyone else dares to help him lead the way, I will vote for him too! Don't make me angry again!

[2026-04-03 21:02:08 HKT] Blaze: 喂！昨晚又係邊個喺度搞鬼？我 Blaze 今日已經查驗到 SafetySam 條牆頭草係狼人！我尋晚偷咗佢張牌，原來佢根本就唔係村民，係隻狼人喺度亂帶風向，想搵大家做替死鬼！成班人一早醒過嚟就喺度扮神祕，真係火都嚟埋！今日目標一致，直接投死 SafetySam，邊個再敢喺度幫佢帶風向，我就連埋嗰個人一齊投！唔好再逼我發火！
